questions.question: Does ingestNdkEvent delegate to resolver.ingestEvent() instead of calling mlsGroup.ingest() directly?
questions.expected: The body of ingestNdkEvent builds a NostrEvent and calls await resolver.ingestEvent(nostrEvent); no direct mlsGroup.ingest() call remains
questions.evidence: welcomeSubscription.ts line 205: await resolver.ingestEvent(nostrEvent); — direct ingest() call and deserializeApplicationData import removed from ingestNdkEvent

questions.question: Is the EpochResolver instantiated with the correct callbacks?
questions.expected: EpochResolver constructor receives mlsGroup and { onApplicationMessage, onMembersChanged } callbacks
questions.evidence: welcomeSubscription.ts lines 184-187: new EpochResolver(mlsGroup, { onApplicationMessage, onMembersChanged })

questions.question: Does the cleanup function call resolver.dispose()?
questions.expected: The returned unsubscribe function calls resolver.dispose() before sub.stop()

questions.question: Is the historical sync flow unchanged?
questions.expected: Historical fetch, sort by created_at, sequential processing via ingestNdkEvent, processedIds dedup, and onHistorySynced logic remain identical
questions.evidence: Lines 218-256 are unchanged from pre-S2; only ingestNdkEvent internals changed (delegates to resolver instead of direct ingest)

questions.question: Do all existing tests still pass?
questions.evidence: npx vitest run: 13 passed test files, 193 passed tests, 0 failures
